stemHtml:
The following information is taken from the operational flight plan of a Medium Range Jet Transport (MRJT) Aeroplane. Calculate the minimum required fuel for take-off if the operator has nominated a suitable En-Route Alternate:

Flight time: 03:15
Flight time from destination to alternate: 00:25
Cruise fuel flow: 2490 kg/h
Holding fuel flow: 1950 kg/h
